expertAssessments.rationale: Landing profile button accessible name now matches the visible identity label and Lighthouse no longer reports label-content-name-mismatch.

expertAssessments.nextAction: Stabilize Playwright MCP start path so targeted rechecks can use live browser automation without fallback notes.

notes: This targeted run closes the blocking accessibility issue discovered in QA-20260424-0340.
Chrome DevTools MCP was used as the authoritative browser check because next_devtools browser_eval start returned MCP error -32000 (Connection closed) during this turn.
The broad regression surface from QA-20260424-0340 was not replayed here; this run is narrowly scoped to the landing accessibility blocker and deployment sanity checks.
